disambiguated.context: Two applicants were being considered for the same new position, Ahmed Hosseini and Carlos Hernandez. Ahmed Hosseini was ultimately selected because of an impressive work history that fit the job perfectly. No one really knows why Carlos Hernandez was shortlisted, though, given the complete lack of relevant qualifications in their resume.
disambiguated.question: Who was qualified for the position?
